title: SC Roller Rink Reveal
excerpt: In addition to the fantastic October Main kit, Roller Rink - which should still be in stock (I heard a rumor that Studio Calico loaded up on these due to increased interest and demand), I got 3 add-ons. But like…
body:
In addition to the fantastic October Main kit, Roller Rink - which should still be in stock (I heard a rumor that Studio Calico loaded up on these due to increased interest and demand), I got 3 add-ons. But like all their other kits, since it has so many fun exclusives (like Cute Overload in custom colors), I wouldn't recommend waiting too long to purchase. Here is what I made with the Main kit only:

Just using Add-On #4, Toe Stop, I made this:

With the Main kit & buttons from Add-On #4, I used an old photo from Thailand that Tara Whitney took:

Using Add-On #2, Couples Skate and the Main kit, I created this layout:

And last, but not least, one of my favorite photos onto one of my favorite papers. I used the Fiskars fingertip craft knife, a metal ruler, and the American Crafts healing mat to cut out the letters. From mixing the Main kit, Add-On's #2, #4 with Add-On #1, Rainbow Kneesocks:

So there you have it. I ended up with a lot of leftover items, and I plan on creating more layouts with them soon. It was pretty easy to create these pages rather quickly considering I was gone for most of this month. Hope you all find the same kind of luck with Roller Rink!

**Also, it might feel too early, but I went ahead and pre-ordered the December Daily kit. In the past, mine have been 4X6, but with a portrait orientation. I am excited to stick with the same small size but just changing the orientation of the album to landscape.
